llm_response:
# Inquiry Regarding Access to Historical Medical Records

## Dear Records Department Team,

Hey there, just wanted to check in about something real quick. I am writing formally to request copies of my father's medical records from your facility dated back to the year 2002. These specific medical records are essential for me to understand his long-term health history accurately. My primary purpose in obtaining these medical records is to assist with a current legal matter involving his past treatments. Please let me know the exact process required to secure these records efficiently. I have attached the necessary identification forms for your review today.

*   Valid government-issued photo identification
*   Signed authorization form from my father
*   Proof of relationship documentation

You can find additional forms on the [facility website](https://example.com/forms). I appreciate your time and assistance with this important request regarding my father's medical records. Thank you very much for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
John Doe

---
